outside_date_duration.initial_outside_date_found: 12-month anniversary of the date of this Agreement
risk_factors: Initial outside date is only 12 months, which is below the 18-month standard for complex deals.
Extensions are limited to 3 months and are automatic only under specific conditions.
No separate regulatory termination fee exists, allowing the buyer to exit without significant antitrust effort incentives.
Standard termination fee provisions do not address regulatory or antitrust issues specifically.

specific_performance_conditions: All conditions to closing must be satisfied or waived except for those that are to be satisfied at the Effective Time.
No material breach by the Company that would prevent closing.
risk_factors: Specific performance is available but contingent on conditions being met.
The buyer has the option to terminate under certain conditions without penalty beyond the termination fee.
Termination Amount is the sole remedy except for knowing and intentional breach or fraud
No explicit definition of willful breach
Termination Amount does not offset damages for willful breach
30-day matching window is relatively long but could be seen as a risk if the superior proposal is significantly better
the requirement for notice before acceptance provides some protection to the acquirer
the acquirer has the right to match a superior proposal, which is favorable for them
Automatic extension based on regulatory conditions
No unilateral extension rights for either party
